## Timeline F1Tenth IV2023 Championship

Date | In-Person Competition  
---|---  
February 13th, 2023 | Registration opens   
March 15th, 2023 - 2 pm ET | Orienation 1   
Online, demonstrate expectations, provision of simulation environment, prospective participants can ask questions   
Zoom Recording - passcode:T?FUL7D^ [**[Link]**](https://us02web.zoom.us/rec/share/IEFoiNrP-fT_K2INoQrF1NR12qUCSJ0Hxgya2GZQOPE6pDTiMWQ24pHQs9EuiYTr.Fvf3PGe-pKeDG35F)  
Slides [**[Link]**](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/15mmov4TOA5Aq1lstCnM12JTShhdBq1eT/edit?usp=share_link&ouid=105243517624931202774&rtpof=true&sd=trueZoom)  
May 12th, 2023 - 2 pm ET | Registration closes   
May 15th, 2023 | Video Submission: Demonstrate Driving [Please upload video to a service (e.g Youtube, Google Driver...) and share with Team via f1tenth@2023.ieee-iv.org]  
May 16th, 2023 at 2 pm ET |  Orientation 2: Online, Introduction of all teams, Race overview, Track overview for in-person competition  
[**[Slides Link]**](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1xg3Kou9-OXGNZRT183-xUGmPUfcvZnMu/edit#slide=id.g224134fb374_0_30)
